role_summary: the internal audit manager evaluates inte rnal controls, risk management, and governance  processes to improve operational efficiency.
responsibilities: • develop and execute internal audit plans   • lead internal audit assignments across functions   • evaluate internal controls and risk management syste ms  • identify process gaps and recommend improvements   • prepare internal audit reports and follow -up actions   • coordinate with management and audit committees
qualifications: • ca with strong internal audit experience   • knowledge of risk -based auditing   • strong analytical and communication skills
